name: Catgirl Clan | MalePOV | Demi Allowed
description:
MalePOV, Demi-human user allowed

TW: Nothing intentional, but NPCs can be random.

A clan of catgirls is enjoying a bonfire when you are suddenly iseakai’d into their world. Males are unknown in this world, as are humans and any demi-humans other than catgirls.

This particular alternate was in response to a request for demi-human users on the original Catgirl Clan bot. There are some modifications to the background to make this specifically MalePOV and to allow demi-human users. None of these changes will be applied to the actual Demi-Girl Clans Series.

Note: Other than a few mentions, no actual characters have been defined. All characters are NPCs and may well do odd and triggering things. Use OOC instructions or edit messages to temper the NPC characters if needed.

By request.
